[cron:321d856c-eb47-44d0-a1de-24fd64d31f4f 盘后复盘-脚本化] 运行盘后复盘脚本：1)检查交易日(休市日:20260101 20260102 20260216-20260220 20260223 20260406 20260501 20260504 20260505 20260619 20260925 20261001-20261007) 2)运行 cd /Users/lynch/.openclaw/workspace-chairong && uv run python scripts/postmarket_pipeline.py 3)输出结果摘要
Current time: Friday, April 10th, 2026 — 18:30 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-10 10:30 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

1. Check trading days (with specific holidays/rest days provided)
2. Run the post-market pipeline script
3. Output a summary

Today is 2026-04-10, which is not in the holiday list, so it should be a trading day.

Now I need to run the post-market pipeline script and provide a summary.

Let me first check if the script exists and what it does, then run it.
